{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/63902427?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Eszh/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Eszh/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Eszh/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Eszh/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Eszh", "id": 63902427, "login": "Eszh", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjYzOTAyNDI3", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Eszh/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Eszh/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Eszh/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Eszh/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Eszh/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Eszh", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-49287", "cvss": {"score": 7.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-470", "name": "Use of Externally-Controlled Input to Select Classes or Code ('Unsafe Reflection')"}], "description": "### Impact

The fix for GHSA-4jjr-vmv7-wh4w was incomplete. It addressed the issue in the query builder, but the same protection was not applied to in-memory collection sorting. Manipulating sort parameters could result in the loss of content and assets.

This requires a front-end template that passes request input into a tag's sort parameter. It is not exploitable by default — a template would need to be explicitly set up to sort by a visitor-controlled value.

### Patches

This has been fixed in 5.73.23 and 6.20.0.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0027, "percentile": 0.18503}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-m92m-r54r-x8r2", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-26T22:15:47Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m92m-r54r-x8r2", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-m92m-r54r-x8r2"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-49287"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-19T18:16:19Z", "published_at": "2026-06-26T22:15:47Z", "references": ["https://github.com/statamic/cms/security/advisories/GHSA-4jjr-vmv7-wh4w", "https://github.com/statamic/cms/security/advisories/GHSA-m92m-r54r-x8r2", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-49287", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m92m-r54r-x8r2"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/statamic/cms/security-advisories/GHSA-m92m-r54r-x8r2", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/statamic/cms", "summary": "Statamic CMS's unsafe method invocation via collection sorting allows data destruction", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-26T22:15:48Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-m92m-r54r-x8r2", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "5.73.23", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "statamic/cms"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 5.73.23"}, {"first_patched_version": "6.20.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "statamic/cms"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 6.0.0, < 6.20.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Statamic CMS's unsafe method invocation via collection sorting allows data destruction
